description: Borrower and Credit Parties shall not permit Liquidity to be less than $15,000,000 at any time from and after the Closing Date. This is the ONLY financial maintenance covenant in the facility.
measurement_basis: Unrestricted cash and Cash Equivalents of the Credit Parties and Subsidiaries held in Collateral Accounts (continuous/maintenance test)
cure_period: None (Sec. 7.2 core-covenant default has no identified cure period)
required_action: Track qualifying controlled-account cash quarterly against the $15M floor; verify covenant-basis cash vs total reported cash.
calculation_or_assumption: Company reports full compliance at 9/30/25, 12/31/25 and 3/31/26 (Q1'26 10-Q Note 8). Headroom uses reported cash + marketable securities and is INDICATIVE — the covenant counts only unrestricted cash in controlled Collateral Accounts.
notes: Legal covenant status = Compliant (as reported by the company). Headroom is an Orion indicative calculation, not a covenant-basis figure. Cross-ref: coherus_credit_agreement.csv row 43/45.

covenant_or_requirement: Absence of leverage / coverage / revenue / EBITDA covenant
description: No leverage ratio, interest or fixed-charge coverage, minimum-revenue, or minimum-EBITDA maintenance covenant exists. Minimum Liquidity is the sole financial maintenance covenant. (A positive-EBITDA / 105%-of-loan liquidity test exists only as a condition to Permitted Acquisitions, not as an ongoing covenant.)
required_action: Recognize there is no performance tripwire; rely on the MAC event of default and liquidity floor for early warning.
calculation_or_assumption: Documentary review of Section 6 confirms no ratio/performance covenant.
notes: Thin financial-covenant package is the largest documentary weakness; limited early warning of credit deterioration.

description: 'Liquidity' = unrestricted cash and Cash Equivalents of the Credit Parties and Subsidiaries held in any Collateral Accounts. Restricted cash and cash outside controlled Collateral Accounts do NOT count.
measurement_basis: Unrestricted cash + Cash Equivalents in Collateral Accounts
required_action: When computing headroom, exclude restricted cash (e.g., ~$240K restricted at 3/31/26) and any cash not in Collateral Accounts.
calculation_or_assumption: Definition narrows qualifying cash below total reported cash; basis for the TSA pass-through sensitivity flag.
notes: Distinguishes covenant-basis Liquidity from reported balance-sheet cash.

description: Excluded Accounts (payroll/benefits, zero-balance, escrow/fiduciary, merchant, legally-restricted, third-party cash-collateral, plus officer-designated accounts capped at $750,000 aggregate) are outside lender control; only unrestricted cash in controlled Collateral Accounts counts toward the Minimum Liquidity covenant.
measurement_basis: Aggregate cap on designated excluded accounts
required_action: Confirm which accounts are Collateral Accounts vs Excluded when validating qualifying liquidity.
calculation_or_assumption: Relevant to the qualifying-cash measurement of the Minimum Liquidity covenant.
notes: Cross-ref: coherus_credit_agreement.csv row 34.

description: Minimum Liquidity is a continuous maintenance covenant tested at all times from and after the Closing Date (2024-05-08); compliance is disclosed on each quarterly/annual financial delivery.
measurement_basis: Continuous maintenance; disclosed quarterly with financials
required_action: Next compliance data point expected with the Q2 2026 10-Q (period ended 2026-06-30).
calculation_or_assumption: Continuous covenant; formal certification via quarterly/annual Compliance Certificate.
notes: Testing is continuous, not period-end only; a mid-quarter dip below $15M would breach.

description: Audited annual financial statements delivered within 90 days of fiscal year-end (or earlier 10-K filing); report may not carry qualifications other than a going-concern qualification under ASC 205-40. EDGAR filing = deemed delivery.
required_action: Confirm each annual 10-K is filed within 90 days; watch for any going-concern language (permitted but a red flag).
calculation_or_assumption: Going-concern qualification expressly permitted — weakens audit-quality protection.
notes: FY2025 10-K carried no going-concern qualification.

description: Unaudited quarterly financial statements delivered within 45 days of quarter-end (or earlier 10-Q filing); EDGAR filing = deemed delivery.
required_action: Confirm each 10-Q is filed within 45 days of quarter-end.
calculation_or_assumption: Satisfied by the 10-Q filing.
notes: Next quarterly delivery: Q2 2026 (period ended 2026-06-30).

description: No monthly financial reporting is required under the facility.
required_action: None; note the reporting gap reduces intra-quarter visibility.
calculation_or_assumption: Absence of monthly reporting confirmed in Section 5.2.
notes: Reporting gap for a burning biotech.

description: No annual budget, board-approved operating plan, or projections delivery covenant.
required_action: No forward-looking delivery obligation; lenders rely on public filings for forecasts.
calculation_or_assumption: Absence of budget/projection delivery confirmed in Section 5.2.
notes: Reduces forward visibility for lenders.

description: A Compliance Certificate signed by a Responsible Officer accompanies (or is delivered within 5 business days of deemed delivery of) each quarterly and annual financial delivery, certifying fair presentation and no Default.
measurement_basis: Delivered with each quarterly/annual financial statement
required_action: Confirm each Compliance Certificate is received; review for any noted Default or covenant calculation.
calculation_or_assumption: No default reported to date.
notes: Certificate is the formal covenant-compliance representation each period.

covenant_or_requirement: Notice of Default / ERISA event / Material Adverse Change
description: Written notice within 5 business days after a Responsible Officer's knowledge of any Default/Event of Default, ERISA Event, or Material Adverse Change.
threshold: Within 5 business days of officer knowledge
actual_or_projected_value: No such notice disclosed to date
required_action: Monitor 8-K/press flow for any triggering event; a missing notice is itself a covenant issue.
calculation_or_assumption: No default/ERISA/MAC notice disclosed through Q1 2026.

description: Prompt notice (deemed given via timely 8-K) of investigations/litigation exceeding Exchange Act materiality thresholds, or alleging Health Care/FDA/data-protection violations re a Specified Product that could reasonably result in a Material Adverse Change.
required_action: Monitor for FDA actions or material litigation touching LOQTORZI.

description: Notify Collateral Agent of material IP challenges/proceedings; written notice within 30 days of entering any Restricted License.
required_action: Monitor for IP disputes or new restricted licenses affecting product IP collateral.
notes: Product IP is core collateral for a biotech.

description: 10 days' prior notice to change jurisdiction/structure/name; may not move books or Collateral > $1,000,000 FMV to new locations without 15 days' notice and a Collateral Access Agreement.
required_action: Watch for any entity redomestication, name change, or material collateral move.

description: Control Agreement required for each Collateral Account (within ~30-45 days of opening/closing; internal 30 vs 45-day inconsistency between Sec. 5.5 and Sec. 5.14(b)); accounts non-terminable without agent consent. Enables cash sweep on default.
required_action: Confirm all material cash sits in controlled Collateral Accounts (also drives covenant qualifying cash).
calculation_or_assumption: Conflicting 30 vs 45-day cure windows flagged in source, not silently resolved.
notes: Cash dominion is a key lender protection; ties to covenant qualifying-cash measurement.

description: Perfection via UCC filings, deposit-account control, IP Security Agreement (USPTO recordation), and certificated-equity delivery; post-closing items on Schedule 5.14 within 30 days; real property > $1M mortgaged within 60 days.
required_action: Confirm continued first-priority perfection; a lapse is itself an Event of Default (Sec. 7.9).

description: Covenant to maintain rights to commercialize the Specified Products (UDENYCA historically, LOQTORZI) and to keep IP protections; IP is pledged collateral (patents, trademarks, copyrights, trade secrets, software, domain names).
required_action: Monitor Junshi license status (LOQTORZI rights) and IP maintenance/challenges.
notes: Value now concentrates in LOQTORZI after UDENYCA divestiture.

description: Collateral Agent has access to Collateral, books and records and may conduct audits/field exams as requested.
required_action: None; agent may exercise inspection rights if concerns arise.

description: Each future Subsidiary (other than Excluded Subsidiaries) must guarantee and grant collateral, joining within 45 days. Current guarantors: Coherus Intermediate Corp., Intekrin Therapeutics Inc., Surface Oncology, LLC, and Coherus Oncology Supportive Care LLC.
actual_or_projected_value: Four named guarantors; Surface Oncology sole significant sub (Ex-21.1)
required_action: Confirm any newly formed/acquired material subsidiary joins as guarantor within 45 days.
calculation_or_assumption: Excluded Subsidiaries = subs with < $2M assets or where pledge is legally prohibited; Coherus Immunology LLC named.
notes: Simple corporate structure limits structural-subordination risk.

description: No Transfer of Collateral or Specified-Product Company IP except Permitted Transfers (ordinary-course inventory, obsolete equipment, intercompany between Credit Parties, Permitted CH-131 license/spin-off, general basket, and redacted clauses (r),(s),(t)).
actual_or_projected_value: Compliant (UDENYCA sale effected via permitted route)
required_action: Monitor asset/IP monetizations; redacted baskets (r),(s),(t) are the main leakage channel and carry NO prepayment sweep.
notes: Permitted Transfers (r),(s),(t) redacted in public filing.

description: Only Permitted Indebtedness allowed (enumerated baskets incl. convertible-note capacity, capital leases, acquisition financing, contingent obligations, general unsecured).
required_action: Track new debt against baskets; large convertible capacity is junior/unsecured (see basket rows).

description: Only Permitted Liens allowed (existing, tax, statutory/landlord, capex-securing, acquisition/assumed, earnest-money); negative pledge in Sec. 6.6 with limited Permitted Negative Pledge exceptions.
required_action: Confirm no competing liens are granted on collateral.

description: No mergers/acquisitions/investments except Permitted Acquisitions and Permitted Investments; a Permitted Acquisition requires no Default, a related business, collateral joinder, and either target positive trailing-4-quarter EBITDA or pro forma Liquidity >= 105% of outstanding Term Loans for 12 months plus board approval.
required_action: Any acquisition must satisfy the EBITDA or 105%-liquidity condition; not an ongoing maintenance test.
calculation_or_assumption: 105%-liquidity test applies only as an acquisition condition, not as a maintenance covenant.

description: No dividends or redemptions except Permitted Distributions (employee equity repurchases capped at $2.5M/year plus key-man insurance proceeds). Cash dividends are effectively blocked.
required_action: Confirm no dividend or non-permitted buyback; only ~$2.5M/yr employee equity repurchases allowed.

covenant_or_requirement: Prepayment / redemption of junior & convertible debt
description: No cash prepayment/redemption of the 2026 Convertible Notes or Permitted Convertible Indebtedness until the Obligations are paid in full, except with equity/convertible proceeds or certain Permitted Transfer proceeds (scheduled interest and fractional-share cash carved out). Certain triggers redacted.
measurement_basis: Junior-debt payment block with proceeds carve-outs
actual_or_projected_value: Compliant (2026 Notes retired via UDENYCA-sale proceeds — a permitted route)
required_action: Note the equity/asset-sale-proceeds carve-out is where cash actually exited; monitor future junior-debt redemptions.
calculation_or_assumption: Redemption triggers partly redacted; 2026 Notes ($230M) reduced to ~$0.1M, matured 2026-04-15.

description: No merger, consolidation, liquidation or dissolution except intercompany (a Credit Party survives) and Permitted Acquisitions.
required_action: Monitor for any reorganization; a change of control separately triggers mandatory full repayment.

description: Transfers of Specified-Product Company IP restricted to Permitted Transfers; no waiver/amendment/termination/breach of Current Company IP Agreements re a Specified Product that could materially adversely impact the product or Credit Party rights.
required_action: Primary biotech leakage vector — monitor any LOQTORZI IP licensing/out-license; redacted baskets carry no proceeds sweep.
calculation_or_assumption: Permitted Transfers (r),(s),(t) partly redacted.

description: Affiliate dealings restricted to arm's-length / ordinary-course terms under the negative-covenant framework and Permitted Investments limits.
required_action: Note the lenders (Barings) and royalty buyer (Coduet, Barings-managed) are related; watch related-party terms.

description: No amendment/waiver of Operating Documents reasonably expected to cause a Material Adverse Change.
required_action: None absent a charter/bylaw change.

description: No knowing action reasonably expected to result in development/commercialization of a LOQTORZI Competitor or UDENYCA Competitor.
required_action: None expected; monitor strategic pivots.

description: Convertible-debt basket = greater of $350,000,000 or 25.0% of Market Capitalization (includes the 2026 Convertible Notes). Grower = 25% of market cap. Structurally junior/unsecured.
measurement_basis: Greater of fixed $ or 25% market cap
threshold: Greater of 350,000 or 25% of market cap
actual_or_projected_value: Capacity largely unused (2026 Notes ~$0.1M, matured Apr 2026)
required_action: Large junior-debt capacity vs the ~$38.7M senior loan; mitigated by term loan's senior secured position.

description: Capital-expenditure / capital-lease debt basket up to $5,000,000.
required_action: Basket availability not disclosed in public filings.
calculation_or_assumption: Usage not disclosed; headroom not calculable from public information.

description: Acquisition-financing (subordinated) basket up to $5,000,000; Subordinated Debt basket up to $5,000,000.
required_action: Availability not disclosed.
calculation_or_assumption: Usage not disclosed.

description: Contingent Obligations up to $2.5M / $5.0M; other unsecured debt up to $2,500,000.
required_action: Availability not disclosed.
calculation_or_assumption: Usage not disclosed.

description: General investment basket up to $2,500,000; Credit-Party-to-non-Credit-Party subsidiary investments up to $2,500,000.
required_action: Tight investment baskets limit value leakage to non-guarantors.

description: Employee equity repurchases up to $2,500,000 per calendar year plus key-man insurance proceeds; no general dividend basket.
required_action: Only real restricted-payment room; confirm annual buybacks stay <= $2.5M.

description: 'Other dispositions' basket up to $1,500,000 aggregate fair market value; larger product monetizations run through redacted baskets (r),(s),(t).
required_action: Material asset/IP monetizations use redacted baskets, which carry NO prepayment sweep.
calculation_or_assumption: Redacted baskets (r),(s),(t) not quantifiable from public info.

description: On any Change in Control, prepay in full (principal + accrued interest + Makewhole if pre-1st anniversary + Prepayment Premium). Non-consensual CoC: within 2 business days; consensual: contemporaneous with 10 business days' prior notice. This is the ONLY mandatory-prepayment trigger.
required_action: A sale/CoC of Coherus forces full repayment with premium — the lender exit event.
calculation_or_assumption: No change of control has occurred.

description: 'Any proceeds from Permitted Transfers shall not require any prepayment of the Term Loan.' There is NO asset-sale mandatory-prepayment sweep.
actual_or_projected_value: No sweep (confirmed: ~$483M UDENYCA proceeds did NOT prepay the loan)
required_action: Largest documentary hole — asset sales can be retained; monitor every disposition for value leakage.
calculation_or_assumption: Confirmed in practice: UDENYCA sale proceeds bypassed the term loan.
notes: Leakage risk given Coherus's asset-monetization strategy.

description: No mandatory prepayment from insurance or condemnation proceeds.
required_action: None; note the absence.

description: No mandatory prepayment from debt or equity issuance proceeds.
required_action: Relevant given the survival plan depends on serial ATM/equity — proceeds are NOT swept to the loan.

description: No excess-cash-flow sweep.
required_action: None; note the absence.

description: No mandatory prepayment from licensing or royalty-monetization proceeds; no reinvestment framework (moot given no sweeps).
required_action: Product IP could be licensed/monetized without repaying lenders; monitor.

description: Principal non-payment = no identified cure period; interest/premium/other Obligations = 3-business-day grace (no cure if due at maturity or on acceleration).
cure_period: 3 business days (interest only); none for principal
required_action: Interest is cash-pay quarterly (no PIK); monitor quarterly interest payments.
calculation_or_assumption: No Event of Default disclosed at 9/30/25, 12/31/25, 3/31/26.

description: Breach of Sec. 5.2-5.7, 5.10, 5.12-5.14, 5.16-5.17 or any Sec. 6 covenant = no identified cure period; any other covenant = 20-day cure after knowledge or notice. Includes Minimum Liquidity and all negative covenants.
required_action: Core covenant breaches (incl. $15M liquidity, negative covenants) have no cure — treat as immediate.

description: A Material Adverse Change is a standalone Event of Default (not merely a representation) — a strong, subjective lender lever.
required_action: Practical early lever if credit deteriorates (no performance covenant exists); monitor MAC-type developments.
calculation_or_assumption: MAC as a direct EoD is notably lender-protective.

description: Trustee process attaching funds > $5,000,000, or lien/levy on material Collateral, not discharged/stayed within 30 days.
required_action: Monitor for material attachments/levies.

description: Involuntary proceeding undismissed 60 days; any voluntary bankruptcy/assignment/inability to pay = no cure. Sec. 7.5 triggers AUTOMATIC acceleration.
required_action: A voluntary filing automatically accelerates the entire loan.

description: Failure to pay other Indebtedness (after its grace) or acceleration by holders where the amount exceeds $5,000,000.
required_action: With convertibles retired, cross-default exposure is limited; monitor any new material debt.

description: Final non-appealable money judgment(s) > $5,000,000 (excl. insured/indemnified) not discharged/stayed/bonded within 30 days.
required_action: Monitor material litigation outcomes.

description: Any representation/warranty incorrect in a material respect (any respect if MAC-qualified).
required_action: None absent a discovered misstatement.

description: Any material Loan Document ceasing to be valid/enforceable, or a Collateral Document ceasing to create/maintain a first-priority perfected security interest in material Collateral.
required_action: Ties to perfection maintenance (Sec. 5.11-5.18); a lien lapse is itself a default.

description: ERISA Event resulting or reasonably expected to result in a Material Adverse Change or a Sec. 303(k) Lien on Collateral.
threshold: ERISA Event w/ MAC or lien
required_action: Low risk given company profile; monitor pension/benefit disclosures.

description: On an Event of Default the Collateral Agent may (or at Required Lenders' direction shall) declare all Obligations due (automatic on insolvency), stop credit, set off and sweep Collateral Accounts (cash dominion), take/sell Collateral with an IP license, and exercise all UCC remedies. Default interest = +4.00% above the applicable rate; Makewhole (if pre-1st-anniversary, now expired) + Prepayment Premium due on acceleration.
required_action: Lenders can accelerate, seize controlled cash, and foreclose (incl. operating IP license) quickly.
calculation_or_assumption: Prepayment Premium: 10% yr1-2, 5% yr2-3, 0% after yr3; make-whole window expired 2025-05-08.
notes: Strong, fast remedies partly offset the thin financial-covenant package.

description: No Event of Default on the 2029 Term Loan at 9/30/2025, 12/31/2025 or 3/31/2026; no amendments or waivers to the 2029 Loan Agreement disclosed. Company reports Minimum Liquidity compliance each period.
actual_or_projected_value: In compliance; no default; no waiver
required_action: Confirm continued compliance and absence of waivers each quarter.
calculation_or_assumption: As reported by the company (legal compliance statement).
notes: The only amendment to date is the June 2024 royalty Omnibus (no term-loan amendments/waivers).

description: Reported unrestricted liquidity of $167.0M (cash $115,238K + marketable securities $51,810K) vs the $15M covenant, i.e., ~11x the floor. Restricted cash $240K at 3/31/2026.
required_action: Treat as indicative; the covenant counts only unrestricted cash in controlled Collateral Accounts (narrower).
source_page_or_section: Liquidity Analysis (As of 2026-03-31); underlying Q1 2026 10-Q balance sheet
calculation_or_assumption: Headroom = (cash 115,238 + marketable securities 51,810) - 15,000. Orion INDICATIVE calc, distinct from covenant-basis Liquidity.
notes: Distinguishes Orion indicative headroom from the company's legal compliance statement.

description: No going-concern qualification or 'substantial doubt' language; management states liquidity is sufficient for at least 12 months from the issuance date.
required_action: Watch for any future going-concern language (permitted under the audit covenant but a red flag).
notes: Audit covenant expressly permits a going-concern qualification.

description: PROJECTED (Orion model): under the modeled financing path, qualifying liquidity is held above the $15M floor through the 2029 maturity, but ONLY by raising ~$154M of cumulative external capital (ATM/equity + ~$9M pw earnout). Minimum modeled ending cash ~$24.4M at Q4 2029.
actual_or_projected_value: Held > 15,000 under modeled ATM (min ending cash ~24,398 at Q4 2029)
headroom: ~9,398 at modeled trough (Q4 2029); positive throughout with financing
required_action: Compliance is CONTINGENT on continued equity/ATM access; monitor ATM usage and share-count dilution.
calculation_or_assumption: Orion PROJECTION (not guidance). Assumes serial ATM/equity (~$154M cumulative 2026-29) to hold covenant; normalized burn excludes Q1'26 one-time TSA distortion.
notes: PROJECTED — Orion model, clearly not legal covenant compliance. Credit trajectory: Stable.

covenant_or_requirement: Minimum Liquidity — first projected breach date
description: PROJECTED (Orion model): no covenant breach under the modeled financing; ABSENT further equity/ATM, qualifying cash falls below the $15M floor at approximately Q4 2027.
measurement_basis: First period modeled qualifying cash < $15M (absent capital)
actual_or_projected_value: ~Q4 2027 (absent further equity/ATM); none if financing continues
required_action: Flag Q4 2027 as the Base-case breach point if capital markets close; track quarterly ATM execution.
calculation_or_assumption: Orion PROJECTION. Material flag: if ~$61.6M of 3/31/26 cash is TSA pass-through (non-qualifying), Base breach moves ~2 quarters earlier to ~Q2 2027.
notes: PROJECTED. Status 'At Risk' reflects contingency on financing access, not a current breach.

description: PROJECTED (Orion model): liquidity holds comfortably above the $15M floor; franchise scales (LOQTORZI toward ~50% penetration, ~$125M FY2029 revenue), burn narrows, and the ~$38.7M loan is repaid from cash at maturity. Minimum modeled ending cash ~$30.7M at Q4 2029.
required_action: Still cash-burning until ~2028; assumes UDENYCA earnouts ($75M) collected and improved equity access (~$125M cumulative capital incl earnouts).
calculation_or_assumption: Orion PROJECTION. Assumes UDENYCA earnouts collected + improved equity access; credit trajectory Improving.
notes: PROJECTED — Orion model. Term loan money-good with rising equity cushion.

covenant_or_requirement: Minimum Liquidity — first projected breach date
description: PROJECTED (Orion model): no covenant breach; comfortably funded. A breach arises only in the hypothetical where ALL modeled capital and earnouts are withheld (~Q4 2027).
actual_or_projected_value: None (only ~Q4 2027 if all capital + earnouts withheld)
required_action: No near-term breach concern under Upside; monitor earnout collection and equity access.
calculation_or_assumption: Orion PROJECTION.
notes: PROJECTED.

description: PROJECTED (Orion model): revenue erosion (penpulimab competition), elevated burn, and closed capital markets exhaust liquidity; qualifying cash falls below the $15M floor at ~Q3 2027 and turns negative by ~Q4 2027. Indicative covenant headroom -$5,474K at Q3 2027, worsening to -$34,239K at Q4 2027. Cumulative external capital needed ~$222.4M (assumed unfunded).
actual_or_projected_value: Falls below 15,000 at ~Q3 2027; qualifying cash goes negative thereafter
required_action: Model a covenant breach ~18 months before the 2029 maturity leading to restructuring/distressed refinancing; recovery rests on first-lien collateral (LOQTORZI license/BLA + pipeline).
source_page_or_section: Downside scenario, Liquidity (Q3'27 headroom) & Conclusion rows
calculation_or_assumption: Orion PROJECTION. Assumes LOQTORZI stalls/declines as penpulimab launches, opex stays elevated, capital markets shut; refinancing requirement = full $38,660K in distress.
notes: PROJECTED — Orion model, NOT a current breach. Credit trajectory: Deteriorating.

covenant_or_requirement: Minimum Liquidity — first projected breach date
description: PROJECTED (Orion model): qualifying cash first falls below the $15M covenant at approximately Q3 2027; liquidity exhaustion (cash <= 0) ~Q4 2027. The $15M liquidity floor — not a performance covenant — is the tripwire.
required_action: Treat ~Q3 2027 as the Downside covenant-breach date; ~18 months before maturity.
calculation_or_assumption: Orion PROJECTION. Material flag: if ~$61.6M of 3/31/26 cash is TSA pass-through (non-qualifying), Downside breach moves ~2 quarters earlier to ~Q1 2027.
notes: PROJECTED.

description: Up to ~$61.6M of the $167.0M cash/marketable securities at 3/31/26 may relate to UDENYCA TSA pass-through and may NOT be freely available / covenant-qualifying. If so, qualifying liquidity is ~$105M (not ~$167M) and the absent-capital covenant-breach date moves ~2 quarters EARLIER in every scenario (Base ~Q2 2027 vs Q4 2027; Downside ~Q1 2027 vs Q3 2027); cumulative external capital required rises ~$60M.
required_action: VERIFY controlled-account (Collateral Account) cash directly against the covenant definition; this materially changes the liquidity/covenant conclusion.
source_page_or_section: Methodology note — TSA pass-through cash SENSITIVITY (material flag)
calculation_or_assumption: Orion sensitivity flag; verify against covenant-basis Liquidity (Sec. 6.16 / def. 'Liquidity').
notes: Highest-priority verification item. PROJECTED sensitivity, not confirmed.

covenant_or_requirement: Value leakage — no proceeds mandatory prepayment
description: No asset-sale, ECF, insurance, debt/equity, or licensing-proceeds prepayment sweep; only change of control forces repayment. Demonstrated by ~$483M UDENYCA proceeds bypassing the term loan. Combined with a now single-product (LOQTORZI) collateral base, asset/IP monetization is the most likely provision to become relevant first.
required_action: Monitor every asset/IP monetization for value leakage; there is no performance covenant to catch deterioration.
notes: Largest documentary weakness; Orion assessment.

description: Post-UDENYCA divestiture, the credit rests on a single commercial product, LOQTORZI (net revenue $40.8M FY2025, $11.8M Q1 2026), in-licensed from Junshi (China single-source). Competitive catalyst: penpulimab (Akeso, FDA-approved Apr 2025) not yet U.S.-launched.
required_action: Monitor LOQTORZI net sales trajectory vs penpulimab U.S. launch and Junshi supply/license status.
notes: Key forward credit risk driving the Downside scenario.

description: Survival to maturity depends on serial ATM/equity dilution (~$154M cumulative Base). Proceeds are NOT swept to the loan, but loss of equity-market access flips the credit to the Downside (covenant breach ~Q4 2027 Base absent capital). Principal downside trigger.
required_action: Track quarterly ATM issuance, share count (~doubling in Base), and any shelf/ATM capacity signals.
calculation_or_assumption: Orion PROJECTION.
notes: Binding constraint is liquidity, not the 2029 maturity or franchise durability.

covenant_or_requirement: Thin covenant package — rely on MAC & cash dominion
description: With no leverage/coverage/revenue/EBITDA covenant and only a $15M liquidity floor, the practical early lever if credit deteriorates is the discretionary MAC event of default plus cash-dominion rights, not a numeric covenant.
actual_or_projected_value: MAC + cash control are the primary levers
required_action: Because there is no performance tripwire, maintain qualitative MAC-watch; confirm cash stays in controlled accounts.
calculation_or_assumption: Orion assessment.

description: Each quarter: (1) confirm 10-Q/10-K and Compliance Certificate filed on time; (2) confirm reported Minimum Liquidity compliance and recompute indicative headroom; (3) reconcile qualifying (controlled-account) cash vs total reported cash; (4) scan 8-Ks for defaults, MAC, litigation/FDA, asset sales/IP licensing; (5) update Base/Upside/Downside breach timing.
required_action: Run the checklist at each quarterly filing; escalate any qualifying-cash approach toward the $15M floor.
calculation_or_assumption: Orion monitoring framework.

description: SEPARATE agreement (junior to the term loan via intercreditor). Coherus sold the right to a Revenue Percentage (5.0% tier-1 / 0.5% tier-2; UDENYCA step-up to 6.5%) of U.S. LOQTORZI (and formerly UDENYCA) net sales to Coduet Royalty Holdings (Barings-managed) for $37.5M upfront, capped at 2.25x per product. On a change of control or Material Adverse Effect the buyer may accelerate to the 2.25x Investment Return Amount. UDENYCA portion bought out Apr 2025 for $47.7M; LOQTORZI portion remains (net carrying ~$14.4M at 3/31/2026).
measurement_basis: Royalty on U.S. net sales; 2.25x cap
actual_or_projected_value: LOQTORZI royalty active (~14,400 net carrying); UDENYCA portion terminated
required_action: Track as a separate junior obligation; its change-of-control acceleration parallels the term loan's CoC prepayment.
source_name: Revenue Participation Right Purchase and Sale Agreement
calculation_or_assumption: Distinct from the Loan Agreement; junior via Intercreditor Agreement. Not a term-loan covenant.
notes: Included for completeness; the term loan is senior to this royalty.
